response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in geospatial routing pipelines, despite claiming C++ exposure in a bachelor’s thesis and NI LabWindows work — neither of which relates to routing, tiling, or navigation systems. Their GIS work is in DLang and Node.js, not the required systems-level C++/Rust stack, and they show no evidence of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or real-time traffic integration critical to the role.
strengths: Strong open-source contributions in geospatial tools (GISCollective)
Extensive full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Proven ability to lead and teach technical concepts through workshops and talks
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or geospatial data tiling
Lack of demonstrated expertise in distributed systems, consistency, or low-latency data pipelines
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) does not align with required C++/Rust core
